title: Badajoz, Extremadura — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Badajoz, Extremadura: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Badajoz is a city in Extremadura with a population of 151,000. The largest city in Extremadura with a historic Alcazaba fortress, Roman ruins, and some of Spain’s most affordable living.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
